medialive.channel.scte35spliceinsert.AdA.Docs: When specified, this offset (in milliseconds) is added to the input ad avail PTS time. This applies only to embedded SCTE 104/35 messages. It doesn't apply to OOB messages.

medialive.channel.scte35spliceinsert.NoR.Docs: When set to ignore, segment descriptors with noRegionalBlackoutFlag set to 0 no longer trigger blackouts or ad avail slates.

medialive.channel.scte35spliceinsert.Web.Docs: When set to ignore, segment descriptors with webDeliveryAllowedFlag set to 0 no longer trigger blackouts or ad avail slates.
